query:
-- Check table structure
DESCRIBE vehicles;

-- Get total counts
SELECT 
  'Total Records' as metric,
  COUNT(*) as value
FROM vehicles;

-- Get distinct manufacturers
SELECT 
  'Distinct Manufacturers' as metric,
  COUNT(DISTINCT manufacturer_id) as value
FROM vehicles;

-- Get distinct models
SELECT 
  'Distinct Models' as metric,
  COUNT(DISTINCT model_id) as value
FROM vehicles;

-- Get distinct engines
SELECT 
  'Distinct Engines' as metric,
  COUNT(DISTINCT engine_id) as value
FROM vehicles;
